text:
Once upon a time there was a man named Larry who heard that somewhere out there, there was a magic book filled with stories so incredible that every page was like a window into another world. Larry was enchanted, dreamy-eyed. Every morning he'd comb the internet looking for mystical book listings.

One evening, while wandering through an abandoned e-commerce forum, he stumbled upon a craigslist listing that said something ridiculous like, "The Power of Dreamland." Intrigued, Larry checked the photo.

It wasn't a book. There was just a lonely, ancient oak tree on a hill.

He thought, perhaps?

After weeks scouring the internet, every fantasy blog, folklore collection, and forum, Larry couldn couldn couldn't believe his eyes:

There it was. A tiny bookshelf tucked under an old branch.

He blinked. Must be dreaming.

He bent down, fingers trembling.

The cover was peeling.

He flipped it open. There was just a blank page.

Defeated, Larry
